verdict.description: merge=ready as-is, close=should close (stale/dupe/harmful), needs-work=fixable issues, needs-discussion=design questions

summary.description: One-sentence summary of the PR and its review status

intent.description: What the PR is trying to accomplish, independent of code quality

risk_factors.description: Specific risk factors: security, breaking changes, data loss, etc.

test_coverage.description: Whether the PR includes tests proportional to its changes

staleness.description: active=updated recently, stale=no updates in 30+ days, abandoned=no updates in 90+ days

merge_blockers.description: Hard blockers that MUST be resolved before merge

changed_files.description: Key files modified by this PR (for duplicate/conflict detection)

close_reason.description: If verdict is close, explain why (stale, duplicate of #N, superseded, harmful)
